calendar.matters:
COURT TRIAL
Off Calendar Aug-01-2016 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: This matter comes on calendar this day, having been assigned from the Presiding Judge
Department 206 for Short Cause Trial/Prove Up. Department 514, Judge: Joseph M. Quinn, Clerk: A. Mok, CSR: Mitch Lyon, CSR#6840.

Daniel A. Conrad, Esq., and Elizabeth J. Hanowsky, Esq., appearing for Plaintiff Andrea
Leung, Conservator of the Person and Estate of Jean Griffin.
No appearance by or on behalf of Defendant Debra Jones.
Witnesses, Andrea Leung and Jonathan Thornton, appearing for Plaintiff, sworn and examined.
Court ordered Defendants Does 1-10 dismissed without prejudice.

Plaintiff's Exhibits:
1- Conservator Andrea Leung's Request for Admissions, Set One
2- Notice of Entry of Order Establishing Admissions and for Sanctions filed 7/18/2016
3- Proof of Service- 1.Notice of Entry of Order Compelling Response to Request for
Production of Documents and for Sanctions; and 2. Notice of Entry of Order Establishing
Admissions and for Sanctions filed 7/19/2016
4- Certified copy of The Conservatorship of the Estate and the Person Jean Griffin,
Conservatee DOC-2014-J842219-00 dated 2/25/2014
5- Certified copy of Joint Tenancy Deed dated 1/3/1962
6- Certified copy of Estate of Bernice Y. Griffin DOC-2015-K069896-00 dated 6/2/2015
7- Certified copy of Notice of Intent to Preserve Interest DOC-2013-J780311-00 dated
11/6/2013
8- Letter from Daniel Conrad, Esq., to Debra Jones dated 8-20-2015
9- CLTA recorded Document Guarantee from Old Republic National Title Insurance Company dated
4/29/2016
Court Returned all exhibits to Plaintiff.

After evidence, Court ordered the following Judgment entered in favor of Plaintiff Andrea
Leung, Conservator of the Person and Estate of Jean Griffin and against Defendant Debra
Jones as follows:
Principal $0
Pre-Judgment Interest $0
Attorney's Fees $29,222.00
Costs $1,460.15
Total Judgment in the amount of $30,682.15

1. The Notice of Intent to Preserve Interest recorded by Debra Jones as instrument number
J780311 on November 6, 2013 against real property located at 539 Los Palmos Drive, San
Francisco, CA 94127, APN 3054-062, described as:

Lot 62, Block 3054, according to "Amended Map of Part of Blocks 3004-B, 3005-B, 3005-C, and
3054, Westwood Highlands, San Francisco, California" filed April 11, 1932 in book "M" of
Maps, pages 68, 69, and 70 in the office of the Recorder of the City and County of San
Francisco, State of California

is invalid and improper, and the Notice is null and void from its recording.

2. Title to 539 Los Palmos Drive, San Francisco, CA 94127, APN 3054-062 is quieted in favor
of Jean Griffin.

3. Jean Griffin is the sole owner of 539 Los Palmos Drive, San Francisco, CA 94127, APN
3054-062.

4. Debra Jones has no deed of trust or mortgage against, nor any interest in, 539 Los Palmos
Drive, San Francisco, CA 94127, APN 3054-062.

5. Defendant Debra Jones' recordation of the Notice of Intent to Preserve Interest is a
slander on title.

6. Plaintiff, Conservator Andrea Leung, is the prevailing party. Defendant Debra Jones is
the losing party.

7.Plaintiff, Conservator Andrea Leung, recover Attorney Fees of $29,222.00 and Costs of
$1,460.15 from Defendant Debra Jones.

Judgment signed in open court.

MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Aug-01-2016 Assigned To Trial Court

Admissions are deemed admitted. Sanctions granted in the amount of $585. Order signed in open court. Judge: Ronald E. Quidachay; Clerk: L. Fong; matter not reported. (501)
